title: FOLLISTATIN 344
description: Follistatin 344 is a glycoprotein that acts as a potent inhibitor of the TGF-β superfamily, specifically binding to and neutralizing myostatin and activins. By inhibiting myostatin, a protein that limits muscle growth, it promotes significant muscle hypertrophy and has shown potential in reducing adipose tissue mass.

research.title: Systemic administration of Follistatin288 increases muscle mass and reduces fat accumulation in mice
research.summary: This study demonstrates that systemic administration of follistatin increases lean body mass, promotes muscle fiber hypertrophy, and significantly decreases body fat mass.

research.title: Follistatin-derived peptide expression in muscle decreases adipose tissue mass and prevents hepatic steatosis
research.summary: Research indicates that follistatin-derived peptides can effectively reduce fat accumulation and protect against fatty liver disease while promoting muscle growth.

research.title: Discovery of a follistatin-derived myostatin inhibitory peptide
research.summary: This paper identifies the specific N-terminal domain of follistatin responsible for inhibiting myostatin, providing a target for treating muscle atrophic diseases.

research.title: Follistatin: a multifunctional regulatory protein
research.summary: A comprehensive review of follistatin's diverse roles in reproductive systems and its critical affinity for activin and myostatin.

sentiment.summary: Users generally report impressive muscle gains, but opinions are split due to high costs, short-lived results after cessation, and concerns regarding the authenticity of available products.

effects.label: Myostatin Inhibition:
effects.description: Highly effective at temporarily overriding genetic limits on muscle growth.

effects.label: Cycle Longevity:
effects.description: Effectiveness often peaks early; many users find gains are difficult to maintain without continued use or strict training.

effects.label: Potency Issues:
effects.description: User consensus suggests that many 'Follistatin' products on the market are underdosed or fake, leading to inconsistent results.

dosage.label: Common Cycle:
dosage.description: 100mcg to 300mcg per day is frequently cited by experienced users.

dosage.label: Loading Phase:
dosage.description: Some users suggest a higher initial dose for 10 days followed by a maintenance period.

dosage.label: Site Injection:
dosage.description: There is debate among users whether localized injections provide better results in specific muscle groups versus systemic effects.

sideEffects.label: Tendon Weakness:
sideEffects.description: Research suggests muscle growth may outpace tendon strength, leading to potential injury.

sideEffects.label: Joint Pain:
sideEffects.description: Some users report increased stiffness or discomfort in joints during peak muscle growth phases.

sideEffects.label: Appetite Fluctuations:
sideEffects.description: Significant shifts in hunger levels are common as metabolism changes.

availability.label: Research Chemicals:
availability.description: Primarily sold through research chemical vendors and not approved for human consumption by the FDA.

availability.label: Legality:
availability.description: Generally legal to purchase as a lab-grade chemical in most jurisdictions, but banned by WADA and most professional sports organizations.
